nasb.text: Even all the people of the land will bury them; and it will be to their renown on the day that I glorify Myself,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: All the people of the land will bury them, and it will bring them renown on the day that I show my glory, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 那地所有的人民都必埋葬他們。這是我得榮耀的日子，以色列人也必因此得享美名。這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 以色列人都来埋葬他们。我彰显荣耀的那天将是以色列人扬眉吐气的日子。这是主耶和华说的。
